prompt: A real-looking professional photograph of a roofer in safety harness installing asphalt shingles on a sloped residential roof in a Quebec suburban neighborhood. Hands-on work, hammer mid-swing, nail gun and asphalt shingles visible, blue sky with light clouds, late-morning light. Photographic, natural lighting, shallow depth of field, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

A real-looking professional photograph of a roofer tearing off old asphalt shingles to expose the roof deck of a residential home. Bundles of new shingles waiting on the roof, dump trailer below, midday natural light. Hands-on, action shot, photographic, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

A real-looking professional photograph of a roofer kneeling on a roof patching a damaged section near a flashing detail at a chimney. Tools and sealant visible, focus on hands and the repair itself. Photographic, natural lighting, shallow depth of field, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

A real-looking professional photograph of a flat commercial roof being installed: a worker rolling out a TPO or modified-bitumen membrane near rooftop HVAC units on a low-slope commercial building. Industrial setting, clear sky. Photographic, natural lighting, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

A real-looking professional photograph of a roof inspector with clipboard and measuring tape on a residential roof, examining a vent boot and flashing. Close-up on hands and clipboard, shingles in focus. Photographic, natural lighting, shallow depth of field, no text, no logos, no watermarks.
